<!-- Thanks for contributing to copilotline. -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what changed and why. -->

## Linked issues

<!-- Example: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test` passes locally
- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` is clean
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] I added or updated tests that fail without this change
- [ ] I updated relevant docs
- [ ] I did not add a new dependency, or the dependency is justified below
- [ ] I confirmed this change does not log or persist sensitive data
      (GitHub tokens, raw Copilot payloads, local settings files)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific you want reviewers to focus on? -->
